sections.paragraph:
Original: צלמנה

Transliteration: tsalmônâh

Phonetic: tsal-mo-naw'

BDB Definition:

Zalmonah = "shady"
  1. a station of Israel during the wilderness wanderings located on the east side of Edom

Origin: fem. of H6757

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
